queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of negative checking account balances as a determinant of default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: no known savings account.
queries.question: Empirical investigation into the risk-mitigating effect of absent savings accounts on credit risk drivers.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical assessment of the contribution of lacking a checking account to credit default likelihood.
